title: Pink tea party brings festive cheer and hope
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - What began in 2022 as...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - What began in 2022 as a heartfelt tribute to their late father has blossomed into a beloved annual tradition.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - What began in 2022 as a heartfelt tribute to their late father has blossomed into a beloved annual tradition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Local sisters Delia van den Handel and Nadia Horley once again gathered the community for their much-anticipated Pink Tea Party, raising funds in support of Hospice Plett."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's event, themed "Pink Christmas", was hosted at Delia's, in the Robberg Bay Shopping Centre, and brought an afternoon of joy, laughter, and generosity. A highlight of the day was a surprise wreath-making demonstration by Daniel DP Ferreira of Ecozest Floral Design, who wowed guests with his festive flair and creativity.","html":"This year's event, themed "Pink Christmas", was hosted at Delia's, in the Robberg Bay Shopping Centre, and brought an afternoon of joy, laughter, and generosity. A highlight of the day was a surprise wreath-making demonstration by Daniel DP Ferreira of Ecozest Floral Design, who wowed guests with his festive flair and creativity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All proceeds from the event go to Hospice Plett (PlettAid Foundation), which provides vital home-based care, chronic disease support and HIV/Aids services to the Bitou community.","html":"All proceeds from the event go to Hospice Plett (PlettAid Foundation), which provides vital home-based care, chronic disease support and HIV/Aids services to the Bitou community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Pink tea party brings festive cheer and hope
